calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rodel E. Rodis for petitioner Jocelyn Quintos Rodis, who was also present.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Establish Fact of Death.

The Court stated that the petition had been well prepared but that a proposed order had not been submitted. The matter with the intent to grant, pending submission of the proposed order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
